title: KT Max-Refactor End-to-End Institutional Memory, Cataloging, Normalization, Professionalization, and Full-Stack Adjudication Program

baseline_context.program_boundary: This program does not silently reopen sealed governance work. It ingests that sealed baseline and then audits KT as a whole.

executive_intent.primary_problem: KT is too large, too layered, too historically accreted, and too cognitively unusual for conversational recall or single-pass reasoning to remain trustworthy.
executive_intent.primary_solution: Build KT's deterministic institutional memory first, then build its normalization and professionalization plans, then run paradox-specific and full-stack adjudication.
executive_intent.teaching_goal: Teach the executing team that KT is not a normal repo. It is a governed organism with organs, interfaces, invariants, histories, lineages, experiments, claims, doctrine, and admissibility ceilings.
executive_intent.end_state: A complete, machine-usable, historically-ingested, canon-aware, professionally-presented KT that can be audited, reproduced, published, competed with, and reasoned about without memory drift or elegant soup.

sovereign_design_laws: Before KT can be judged, KT must be reconstructed.
Before KT can be normalized, KT must be remembered mechanically.
Before KT can claim paradox superiority, paradox metabolism must be modeled, stressed, and bounded.
No current-head claim may overread subject-evidence lag.
No freeform inference is allowed. Only schema-bound, rule-derived judgments with explicit evidence chains are admissible.
The cartographer may propose canon. It may not ratify canon.
No mutation may begin until the relevant audit contracts pass.
If an unparseable or opaque artifact contaminates a sovereign or critical runtime path, that path must be marked STATE_TAINTED until isolated or resolved.
No learning delta is admissible unless it is lineaged to an experiment or crucible record with explicit receipts.
Paradox hold states must have TTL or forced fail-closed/escalation semantics. Indefinite hold is forbidden.

clauses: Perform a comprehensive system audit before any mutation work.
Treat the repo as frozen until the current step's audit contract passes.
Re-scan relevant files, records, receipts, schemas, and prior outputs on every response.
Maintain chronological context and reuse known fixes instead of rediscovering solved work.
Fail closed on ambiguity touching authority, runtime integrity, paradox handling, publication claims, security, or external profiles.
Do not mutate canon, doctrine, runtime roots, or public claim surfaces without explicit ratification artifacts.
Do not let generated doctrine become law without ratification.
Do not widen scope silently. Emit contradiction evidence instead.

judgment_plane.definition: Rule-derived conclusions only, always backed by evidence chains

temporal_plane.definition: Supersession, ratification, deprecation, invalidation, reopening, regeneration, and epoch change memory

proof_plane.definition: Proof obligations, formal invariants, counterexamples, theorem targets, admissibility ceilings

operability_plane.definition: Outsider usability, onboarding, reproducibility, benchmarkability, publication readiness, release readiness

lineage_plane.definition: Data, model, adapter, experiment, delta, receipt, doctrine, and profile lineage

foundation_pack_required_before_ingestio.gate_rule: No ingestion, tagging, or cataloging compiler run may begin until the foundation pack exists and validates.

quality_model.rule: Any organ or module below required quality level for a target use case must be blocked from that use case.

claim_discipline.claim_ceiling_rule: No claim may exceed the highest admissibility supported by explicit evidence-chain-backed machine outputs.

severities.P0_authority: authority contradictions, truth-source ambiguity, admissibility breach
severities.P0_runtime_integrity: runtime-boundary violations, illegal mutation paths, security invariants
severities.P1_governance: governance law drift, ratification inconsistencies, platform/governance contradictions
severities.P1_claim_evidence: claims outrunning evidence or evidence contradicting active narrative
severities.P2_schema_drift: schema mismatch, duplicate truth surfaces, contract drift
severities.P2_duplicate_surface: multiple competing surfaces for one declared function or truth class
severities.P3_doc_staleness: documentation lag, naming inconsistency, low-risk narrative drift

workstreams.name: KT_GOVERNANCE_CLOSEOUT_BASELINE_INGESTION
workstreams.objective: Freeze the sealed governance/admissibility program as immutable baseline input to the whole-system program.
acceptance_tests: baseline subject and evidence heads are explicit
proven vs not_proven is explicit
open blockers are explicit
no new governance victory claims are introduced

workstreams.name: FOUNDATION_PACK_RATIFICATION
workstreams.objective: Create and ratify the foundation schemas, ontology instances, interface law, state vector schema, evidence ledger schema, safety envelope, run modes, and release law.
acceptance_tests: schema and instance are separated where required
ontology covers all first-class KT organs
invariants are machine-checkable or mechanically targetable
interface law defines allowed and forbidden transitions
state vector schema exists
evidence ledger schema exists
safety envelope is explicit
run modes are explicit
release law is explicit
fail_closed_conditions: instance used where schema is required
invariants remain prose-only with no enforcement target

workstreams.name: CONSTITUTIONAL_SPINE_AND_META_GOVERNANCE
workstreams.objective: Define constitutional, meta-governance, dependency, epoch, quality, forgetting, accreditation, self-description, and court procedures.
acceptance_tests: constitution defines what KT is, is not, may do, must not do, and what counts as law, evidence, proof, and violation
meta-governance defines who governs governance and who audits auditors
constitutional court procedure exists
epoch model exists
forgetting law exists
dependency matrix exists
self-description exists

workstreams.name: HISTORICAL_EVIDENCE_INGESTION_AND_FORGOTTEN_SURFACE_RECOVERY
workstreams.objective: Ingest old audits, canon/codex outputs, old conflict registers, crucible logs, receipts, and historical doctrine into machine-usable artifacts.
acceptance_tests: historical governance ladders ingested
canon/codex history ingested
old conflict registers ingested
crucible history ingested where available
forgotten but previously important surfaces explicitly listed

workstreams.name: SNAPSHOT_DETERMINISM_AND_PHYSICAL_INVENTORY
workstreams.objective: Produce deterministic snapshot manifest, physical inventory, parse results, and parse failures.
acceptance_tests: 100 percent file inventory coverage
every file has path, size, type, hash, generation status, parse state
parse failures are explicit
identical snapshot rerun produces identical outputs
workstreams.taint_rule: If an opaque or parse_failed artifact contaminates a sovereign or critical runtime path, mark STATE_TAINTED and block downstream proof promotion until isolated or resolved.

workstreams.name: STRUCTURAL_PARSE_TAG_CATALOG_AND_GRAPH_COMPILATION
workstreams.objective: Tag, catalog, classify, and graph all parseable KT surfaces across fact, temporal, and lineage planes.
acceptance_tests: every node and edge type validates against schema
all edges carry provenance
tags and facets are applied consistently
temporal supersession and deprecation are represented
lineage of adapters, models, sectors, and data exists

workstreams.name: CLAIM_EXTRACTION_JUDGMENT_ENGINE_AND_STATE_VECTOR
workstreams.objective: Extract all claims, compute bounded judgments, produce state vector, and register conflicts and counterexamples.
acceptance_tests: all major claim-bearing surfaces are extracted
every judgment has evidence chains
state vector includes claim ceiling, blockers, organ readiness, doctrine version, canon version, proof obligations, lineage completeness, normalization status, adjudication status
conflicts are severity-ranked

workstreams.name: CANON_PROPOSAL_NORMALIZATION_PLAN_AND_REPO_PROFESSIONALIZATION_PLAN
workstreams.objective: Propose canon and generate reversible normalization and beautification plans without mutating KT yet.
acceptance_tests: one canonical path proposal per major function
deprecated and generated artifact policies exist
professionalization plan covers repo shape, docs, schemas, release layout, submission layout
all work orders include migration tests and rollback plans

workstreams.name: RUNTIME_EXPERIMENT_CRUCIBLE_AND_DELTA_REGISTRY
workstreams.objective: Make runtime runs, experiments, crucibles, attacks, sector tests, and learning deltas fully auditable.
acceptance_tests: every experiment has config, metrics, verdicts, receipts, and lineage
every learning delta points back to experiment or crucible lineage
runtime event and trace schemas exist
fitness ecology is formalized
workstreams.crucible_primacy_rule: No new delta, axiom promotion, or training advancement is admissible unless cryptographically and lineally linked to a governed experiment or crucible artifact.

workstreams.name: PARADOX_METABOLISM_VERIFICATION_PROGRAM
workstreams.objective: Model, stress, and bound paradox metabolism as a first-class KT organ.

workstreams.name: DOCTRINE_COMPILER_PROFILES_AND_EXTERNAL_PROFESSIONALIZATION
workstreams.objective: Generate doctrine, playbooks, profiles, and external-facing professional artifacts directly from machine state.
acceptance_tests: doctrine is generated from ratified machine state
profiles list required capabilities, current evidence, and explicit gaps
outsider onboarding is explicit
publication and competition boundaries are explicit

workstreams.name: FULL_STACK_ADJUDICATION_RELEASE_READINESS_AND_FINAL_E2E_AUDIT
workstreams.objective: Run adversarial whole-system adjudication across every major KT organ, claim, and operating profile.
acceptance_tests: all major organs are covered
all major claims are classified as proven, evidenced_only, contradicted, or aspirational
remaining proof obligations are explicit
release readiness is explicit per profile

execution_style.pacing_rule: Strictly sequential by workstream. Read-only steps may batch internally. Mutation or ratification steps require explicit post-touch report and explicit approval to continue.

program_pass: all foundation artifacts exist and validate
all compiler outputs are reproducible under canonical runner
all major KT organs are defined, cataloged, and audited
all derived judgments have evidence chains
historical memory is ingested and forgotten surfaces are surfaced
paradox metabolism is explicitly modeled and bounded
normalization and professionalization plans exist before execution
all doctrine and profiles are machine-state-derived
full-stack adjudication classifies every major claim and remaining proof obligation
program_fail: release or competition claims exceed ceilings

what_to_do_now: Deliver this packet as the controlling master work order.
Do not start arbitrary ingestion yet.
Then freeze governance baseline into the new constitutional and compiler context.
Then run inventory, tagging, cataloging, parsing, graphing, and historical ingestion.
Then generate canon and normalization plans.
Then formalize experiments, deltas, and paradox verification.
Then run the final whole-system adversarial adjudication.
what_not_to_do: Do not skip state vector or evidence ledger.
Do not normalize before compiler outputs exist.
Do not publish or compete from narrative alone.

closeout_phrase_for_this_packet: This packet is the max-power, refactor-ready, ingestion-first, cataloging-complete, professionalization-bound, paradox-aware, fail-closed controlling order for the KT full end-to-end audit and repo elevation program.
